$doc: BMD-derived input→output pairs for the Recast exclusion metric. Used by both ehc_contracts.metrics.recast.identify_recast_projects and by the Board Auditor's independent implementation in ehc-data-analysis/data_board_auditor/scripts/recalculate_metrics.py. If both pass against this file, they agree on what 'recast' means.

cases.name: clean_bool_mixed
cases.description: Typical production shape — bool column with True / False / NaN, numeric REF_IDs.

cases.name: all_false
cases.description: No recast projects in the fund.

cases.name: all_true
cases.description: Every project in the board is recast (edge case — degenerate fund).

cases.name: empty_board
cases.description: Board is present but has zero rows.

cases.name: missing_recast_column
cases.description: Board has REF_ID but no Recast column. Safe-default: return empty set, do not error.

cases.name: missing_ref_id_column
cases.description: Board has Recast but no REF_ID column (malformed). Safe-default: empty set.

cases.name: ref_id_with_nan
cases.description: Row with NaN REF_ID is silently dropped from the recast set.

cases.name: null_board
cases.description: Board is None (dp_JSB_Board sheet absent from V3). Safe-default: empty set.
